---
title: "Realistic Evaluation Chapter Map"
description: "Reading map for selected Realistic Evaluation notes."
book_id: "realistic-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Map"
citation_key: "pawson_tilley_1997_realistic_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:realistic-evaluation:introduction:c0011"
  - "chunk:realistic-evaluation:ch03-chapter-3-in-with-the-new-introducing-scientific-realism:c0051"
  - "chunk:realistic-evaluation:ch09-chapter-9-the-new-rules-of-realistic-evaluation:c0008"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This map uses selected MCP research-library sections from *Realistic Evaluation* [@pawson_tilley_1997_realistic_evaluation].

## Reading Route

1. [Reader's Guide to Context, Mechanism, and Outcome](section-01-reader-guide-cmo.qmd) - pages 14-15; `Introduction`
2. [Scientific Realism and CMO Hypotheses](section-02-scientific-realism-and-cmo.qmd) - pages 94-95; `Chapter 3: In with the New: Introducing Scientific Realism`
3. [The New Rules and CMO Configurations](section-03-new-rules-cmo-configurations.qmd) - pages 234; `Chapter 9: The New Rules of Realistic Evaluation`

## How to Use This Map

- Start with the first section for the book's framing logic.
- Use the middle section to inspect the main design or method implications.
- Use the final section to check limits, quality standards, or implications for use.

## References
